commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof, not a code repair ClawSweeper can generate.; Cleared: The diff changes Gateway session display/search projection and tests only; it adds no dependency, workflow, secret, network, permission, or code-execution surface. (sha=3dd0c5e31e727b29732897cfeb210c9ffdd646fc)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds shared gateway session row/search fallbacks that resolve direct-session display names from configured channel account names, with precedence and default-account tests.

PR surface: Source +210, Tests +202. Total +412 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main falls through to `origin.label` for direct-session display/search even though account `name` is the existing CLI/UI display contract.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof, not a code repair ClawSweeper can generate.

target.title: fix(sessions): use account names for direct display
target.body:
## Summary

- Use configured channel account names as the display fallback for direct session rows when the current label is only an opaque direct peer id.
- Preserve existing precedence for explicit `displayName`, session labels, group display names, and meaningful origin labels.
- Include the account-name fallback in `sessions.list` search so users can find the readable account name.

Closes #79183

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.search.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Direct Feishu-style session rows can show the configured channel account name instead of an opaque direct peer id when no stronger label exists, and `sessions.list` search can find that readable account name.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on this PR branch (`codex/session-display-account-name-79183-20260618`) with repository dependencies available, exercising the gateway session-list and search paths through the repository gateway test harness.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.search.test.ts --reporter=verbose
git diff --check
```

Evidence after fix: Terminal capture from the local OpenClaw gateway session run showed the changed behavior:

```text
✓ |gateway-core| ../../src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts > gateway session utils > direct channel session rows fall back to configured account names
✓ |gateway-core| ../../src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts > gateway session utils > direct channel account names preserve labels and meaningful origin labels
✓ |gateway-core| ../../src/gateway/session-utils.search.test.ts > listSessionsFromStore search > filters direct sessions by configured account display fallback

Test Files  8 passed (8)
Tests  524 passed (524)
[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 49.90s
```

Observed result after fix: The gateway tests verify a direct Feishu-style session can resolve/display `Quote Assistant` from `channels.<channel>.accounts.<account>.name`, explicit labels and meaningful origin labels still win, and search finds sessions by the configured account display fallback. `git diff --check` produced no output.

What was not tested: A live Feishu/OpenClaw runtime was not started in this environment; the focused gateway session-list/search test path above exercises the affected runtime projection logic.
target.author: leno23

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: leno23
commands.command:
re-review: addressed the direct-session account fallback issue. for omitted-account direct keys such as `agent:main:feishu:direct:<peer>`, display-name resolution now tries configured `channels.<channel>.defaultaccount` and implicit `accounts.default` before falling back to the parsed agent id.

validation:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.search.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check`
commands.freeform_prompt:
addressed the direct-session account fallback issue. For omitted-account direct keys such as `agent:main:feishu:direct:<peer>`, display-name resolution now tries configured `channels.<channel>.defaultAccount` and implicit `accounts.default` before falling back to the parsed agent id.

Validation:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.search.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check`
